sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 매출 172억 7,600만 달러·순이익 57억 8,500만 달러를 기록한 Merck 2025-09-30은 Keytruda 성장과 MK-8690 권리 이전이 핵심 축이다.

keyPoints.text: Merck는 MK-8690 협력을 종료하고 글로벌 권리를 확보한 대신 Falk에 $150 million 선급금을 지급해 연구개발 비용으로 반영할 것이라 밝혔고, 이는 사업 구조 전환의 직접 비용 신호다.

riskChanges.text: MK-8690은 초기 임상 단계 항체로, 기존 공동개발 구조가 해소된 뒤 Merck가 전 과정을 책임지는 만큼 임상 결과·개발 지연 리스크가 전적으로 회사에 귀속된다.

businessChanges.text: 사업 포트폴리오 운영 방식에서 MK-8690은 기존 공동개발·공동상업화 권한을 정리하고 Merck가 전면 책임을 지는 구조로 전환되어, 파이프라인 통제권이 Merck로 집중됐다.
미국 Keytruda 수요 확장은 요로·자궁내막·두경부 전이성 적응증뿐 아니라 NSCLC, cervical, TNBC, RCC 같은 초기 단계 적응증까지 확대되며 세그먼트 기여의 폭을 넓혔다.
Lynparza는 다이제스트에서 3분기 379, 12%와 1,061, 12%로 제시되어 알리아스 라인업의 수익 기여가 유지되는 구간으로 보인다.

financialHighlights.text: 총자산은 1,295억 4,600만 달러, 현금및현금성자산은 181억 6,900만 달러로 재무 안전판 규모를 확인할 수 있다.

watchItems.text: Keytruda 성장(10%, 8%) 자체보다, 약 $100 million 도매상 타이밍 효과와 같은 구조적 조정 요인이 빠져나간 순수 수요 추세인지가 다음 분기 해석의 핵심이 될 것이다.
MK-8690 글로벌권 확보가 장기 성장성으로 전환되는지 판단하려면, 초기임상 단계에서의 임상 진척 속도와 함께 $150 million 선급금이 향후 비용 구조에 어떤 패턴으로 반영되는지를 추적해야 한다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2025-09-30 revenue = 172억 7,600만 달러 (USD 17.276B; 17,276 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 net income = 57억 8,500만 달러 (USD 5.785B; 5,785 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 total assets = 1,295억 4,600만 달러 (USD 129.546B; 129,546 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 cash and cash equivalents = 181억 6,900만 달러 (USD 18.169B; 18,169 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.

Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations Business Development Transactions Below is a summary of significant business development activity thus far in 2025. In November 2025, Merck reached an agreement with Dr. Falk Pharma GmbH (Falk) to discontinue an existing contract concerning co-development and co-commercialization rights in certain territories for MK-8690 (formerly PRA-052), and for Merck to assume full responsibility for the development program going forward. MK-8690 is an investigational anti-CD30 ligand monoclonal antibody being evaluated by the Company in an early-stage clinical trial. Under the terms of the agreement, Merck and Falk have discontinued their collaboration based on their existing co-development contract resulting in Merck having secured global rights to MK-8690. In exchange, Falk will receive a $150 million upfront pay Readable Korean unit: 1억 5,000만 달러.

Results of Operations Business Development Transactions Below is a summary of significant business development activity thus far in 2025. In November 2025, Merck reached an agreement with Dr. Falk Pharma GmbH (Falk) to discontinue an existing contract concerning co-development and co-commercialization rights in certain territories for MK-8690 (formerly PRA-052), and for Merck to assume full responsibility for the development program going forward. MK-8690 is an investigational anti-CD30 ligand monoclonal antibody being evaluated by the Company in an early-stage clinical trial. Under the terms of the agreement, Merck and Falk have discontinued their collaboration based on their existing co-development contract resulting in Merck having secured global rights to MK-8690. In exchange, Falk will receive a $150 million upfront payment, which the Company will record as a charge to Research and  Readable Korean unit: 1억 5,000만 달러.

Research and Development Update” below. Global sales of Keytruda grew 10% and 8% in the third quarter and first nine months of 2025, respectively. Keytruda sales growth in the U.S. in both periods reflects higher demand and net pricing. Demand in the U.S. in both periods was driven by increased utilization across the multiple approved metastatic indications, in particular for the treatment of certain types of urothelial, endometrial, and head and neck cancers, as well as higher demand across earlier-stage indications, including in certain types of non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), cervical cancer, triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC), and renal cell carcinoma (RCC). U.S. Keytruda sales in the third quarter of 2025 reflect a benefit of approximately $100 million due to the timing of wholesaler purchases, partially offset by other channel movements. Keytruda sales growth in international Readable Korean unit: 1억 달러.
